meaning: adj.擦亮的,有光泽的,晴朗的,闪耀的,发亮的
examples: Her blonde hair was shiny and clean.
Avoid using pans with a shiny, reflective base as the heat will be reflected back.
The trend now is toward "lifestyle" electronics – black, shiny gee-whiz things that people like to own.
Apple wants us to see the corporation as a cool and trendy company with shiny products.
They can't pay players, so they choose the next best thing: shiny facilities to lure them.
